title: pubchem-hydroxyapatite-cid24856

title: pubchem-dexamethasone-cid5743

title: cellosaurus-mc3t3-e1-cvcl0409
why_relevant: Cell line — MC3T3-E1 (mouse pre-osteoblast, C57BL/6 calvaria origin). Primary candidate cell line for the proliferation readout. ATCC CRL-2593 cross-ref.

title: cellosaurus-mc3t3-e1-subclone4-cvcl5437
why_relevant: Cell line — MC3T3-E1 Subclone 4 (more reliably osteogenic subclone, ATCC CRL-2593). Stronger differentiation phenotype.

title: cellosaurus-saos-2-cvcl0548
why_relevant: Cell line — Saos-2 (human osteosarcoma, mature osteoblast-like). Comparator cell line for human-context proliferation.

title: cellosaurus-hfob-1-19-cvcl3708
why_relevant: Cell line — hFOB 1.19 (human fetal osteoblast, conditionally immortalised). Closer to primary human osteoblast biology.

title: thermo-picogreen-p11496
why_relevant: Catalog — Quant-iT PicoGreen dsDNA Assay kit, ThermoFisher P11496. Primary DNA-content proliferation readout.
